about.title: Company Profile
about.content: Shenzhen Zhiding Weilai Technology Co., Ltd. (referred to as "Zhiding Future") is a service provider enterprise focusing on the research, promotion, and multi-scenario commercial application design of Chinese culinary standardization. Through the integration of artificial intelligence hardware and software application systems, it helps traditional Chinese catering upgrade comprehensively towards "standardization, scalability, and digitalization."

hero.eyebrow: Dietary Revolution in the AI Era
hero.title: Tech for Cuisine, Delicious Life
hero.subtitle: Liberating productivity from tedious Chinese cooking through innovative technology to achieve effortless cooking. We adhere to our original aspiration of "Tech for Cuisine, Delicious Life" so that Chinese culinary culture can be inherited and shared with the world, offering safe and delicious Chinese flavors!

products.title: Stir-fry Induction Commercial Smart Cooking Robot
products.description: Specialized in high-temperature quick stir-frying for individual orders. Perfectly suited for dinner courses, specialty stir-fry, and rice-topping fast food chains. Featuring a compact structural design and high-sensitivity electromagnetic induction technology, it realizes precise temperature control to recreate master-level fire curves. Supports one-click cloud digital recipe download and deployment, ensuring every stir-fry restores traditional artisan flavors.

stats.label: Automatic Seasoning System
stats.text: (including starch, saltwater, and combined sauces) auto-dispensation

products.title: Rolling Drum Induction Commercial Smart Cooking Robot
products.description: Specialized in flexible batch catering, compatible with stir-frying and multi-order combinations in a single run. The prime choice for buffet fast food and medium-to-small cafeterias. Featuring a medium-capacity drum design and a fully automatic robotic arm dish-pouring mechanism. Equipped with precise temperature control and precise solid/liquid seasoning auto-dispensation, it easily masters complex sautéing and stewing processes across various cuisines.

products.title: Large Scale Collective Induction Commercial Smart Cooking Robot
products.description: A powerhouse for large-scale cafeteria central production, customized for corporate canteens, universities, hospitals, and central kitchens. Features a 360-degree forward and reverse tilting drum paired with multi-intensity active mixing, ensuring uniform heating for large batches of ingredients, enabling effortless high-efficiency, high-volume catering.

advantages.sectionTitle: Unveiling a New Era of Smart Cooking
advantages.techDesc: Driven by precise electromagnetic induction temperature control and electronic recipes, achieving 100% precise control over cooking heat, perfectly replicating master-level tossing, stir-frying, and temperature regulation.
advantages.standardDesc: Synchronize massive premium recipes from the cloud with a single click to terminals, perfectly solving traditional pain points such as taste inconsistency, high chef labor costs, and expansion barriers.
advantages.syncDesc: Based on the AIoT cloud platform, enabling online monitoring of equipment status, remote recipe upgrades, and real-time cooking parameters calibration. Easily manage large-scale catering chains.

founder.name: Hua Cheng
founder.title: Pioneer in Multi-Scenario Commercial Application of Chinese Culinary Standardization
founder.bio: For 16 years, dedicated to researching and promoting the commercial landing of Chinese food standardization. Exploring the integration of technology and cuisine to help traditional Chinese catering comprehensively upgrade toward 'standardization, digitalization, and intelligence.'

footer.disclaimer: All smart cooking hardware structures, IoT cloud scheduling systems, and cooking temperature control curve algorithms on this website are owned by the equipment manufacturers. Part of the 3D product renders are generated by neural networks for functional illustration. Zhiding Future is dedicated to blending advanced AI technology with traditional cooking art to unlock the catering intelligence revolution.
